message:
The other day, my pup, Charlie, decided that the thunderstorm outside was a perfect excuse for a little extra snuggling. As the rain poured and the wind howled, we made a cozy fort in the living room with blankets and pillows—his favorite spot! It turned into a delightful little adventure, complete with snacks and a movie. 

While we were hunkered down, I took a moment to think about how we could make our home even more prepared for unexpected weather. A little planning can turn a stormy day into a cozy memory, don’t you think?  

Have you ever turned a tricky situation into a fun family moment?
